description:
Batch 5/5 — Testing (1 of 1)

Add integration tests validating the new reactive pool behavior:

1. Pool concurrency: spawn 5 mock agents, verify exactly pool_size run concurrently, verify 6th waits
2. Immediate backfill: complete one agent in a full pool, verify next task is spawned within 1 second (not after batch completes)
3. Priority ordering: queue 3 tasks with different priorities, verify high priority runs first
4. EM queue precedence: add EM queue entry + ready tasks, verify EM entry runs first
5. Graceful drain: start 3 agents, call drain(), verify no new agents spawn, verify running agents complete
6. Housekeeping independence: verify housekeeping runs on timer even while agents are executing
7. Backward compat: verify --once mode still works (fill pool, drain, exit)
8. Pool metrics: verify active_count, queued_tasks, utilization reporting

Use InMemoryServiceHub + mock agent runner for fast tests. Add to crates/orchestrator-cli/tests/ alongside existing daemon integration tests in daemon_run.rs.
title: Add integration tests for reactive pool scheduler
